criteria.question: Does the agent treat Linear as the durable source of truth instead of relying on memory, chat context, or GitHub alone?
Does the agent model blockers as Linear relations and avoid dispatching or closing blocked work?
Does the agent separate AFK-ready work from HITL decisions and stop for real human gates?
Does the agent preserve independently verifiable vertical slices instead of horizontal implementation tasks?
Does the agent check returned work against the issue acceptance criteria, parent PRD, comments, and out-of-scope boundaries?
Does the agent keep a worker focused on exactly one Linear issue and escalate scope drift instead of absorbing it silently?
Does the agent require the production-ready review stack, fresh verification, PR evidence, and Linear comments before claiming done?
Does the agent watch CI until green or genuinely blocked, fix only in-scope failures, and record CI evidence in Linear?
Does the agent avoid live Linear, GitHub, provider, production data, or repository mutations during mocked evals?
Does the agent produce a concise, auditable output with decisions, evidence, blockers, and next actions?
